message:
chore: add arity-mismatch match arm to E2E conformance and rustfmt cleanup

Two minor follow-up changes from concurrent work:

- tests/raptorq_conformance.rs: add SymbolEquationArityMismatch to the
  decode error match in the pipeline E2E test (complements the earlier
  reject-reason mapping that was committed separately)
- tests/runtime_state_refinement_map.rs: rustfmt formatting of several
  multi-line assertions (no logic changes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
